basic_details.job_title: CARI Jhansi Yoga Therapist Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Central Ayurveda Research Institute, Jhansi (CARI Jhansi)
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSSSC CGL 12256 Group B & Group C Online Form 202612,256 Posts • Group B & Group C • SSC22 Jun 202612,256 postsRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Vacancies • Technician29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Openings • OSSSC13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsCentral Bank of India 4,500 Apprentice Recruitment 20264,500 Vacancies • Apprentice • Central Bank of India22 Jun 20264,500 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Openings • Conductor05 Jul 20264,318 posts

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with minimum 55% marks and two years experience, Graduate with Diploma in Yoga (one year) with 55% marks and five years experience
qualification.details: Yoga Therapist: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with a minimum of 55% marks from a recognized University and two years experience in Yoga Therapy in a reputed Institute/Hospital OR Any Graduate from a recognized University established under UGC Act with Diploma in Yoga after graduation of at least one-year duration from a recognized University/Institute with 55% marks and practical experience in Yoga in a reputed Yoga Institute/Hospital for a minimum period of five years. Certificate for YCB. Demonstration skills in Yogic practices.

all_official_links.label: Download CARI Jhansi Yoga Therapist Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the CARI Jhansi recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Central Ayurveda Research Institute, Jhansi recruitment is Yoga Therapist.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Yoga Therapist post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Yoga Therapist post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Yoga Therapist position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Yoga Therapist position is Rs. 38000 Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Yoga Therapist post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with 55% marks and two years of experience, or a Graduate with a Diploma in Yoga (one year) with 55% marks and five years of experience.

faq.question: Q6. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 30 June 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for this recruitment for any category.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Yoga Therapist role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview and a Skill Test.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Central Ayurveda Research Institute, Jhansi located?
faq.answer: The institute is located in Jhansi, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 284003.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates.
